scripts.build:cf: npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && powershell -Command "Rename-Item .open-next/worker.js _worker.js -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -Path .open-next/assets/* -Destination .open-next -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Content -Path .open-next/_routes.json -Value '{\"version\":1,\"include\":[\"/*\"],\"exclude\":[\"/_next/static/*\",\"/*.ico\",\"/*.svg\"]}'"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:cf && npx wrangler pages deploy .open-next --project-name=codepath-web
